---
name: New profile
about: Request or propose a new Hermes agent profile
title: "Create [profile-name] profile"
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What role does this profile serve? What problem does it solve?

## Methodology

What methodologies, frameworks, or operating principles define this role?
(e.g., C4 + ADRs + arc42 for technical-architect, RICE + MoSCoW for product-manager)

## Required Skills

List the skills this profile needs from the shared pool, and any new skills
that would need to be added.

## Related Profiles

Which existing profiles would this one work alongside? (Check SOUL.md files
for cross-references.)

## Verification

- [ ] Accepts a role-appropriate prompt and produces an artifact pyramid
- [ ] Response is the absolute path to 00-index.md, not a summary
- [ ] Symlinks resolve correctly
